query:
SELECT 
  p.name as unvan,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as kategori_sayisi,
  COUNT(pq.id) as soru_sayisi
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE p.id IN (1, 3, 4, 5, 6)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY p.id

  COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as kategori_sayisi,
  COUNT(pq.id) as soru_sayisi
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE p.id IN (1, 3, 4, 5, 6)
